description: Style Note Referencing the distressed leather aesthetic of the Wild West, this pair of sandals from red tape are crafted to add a subtle polish to your off-duty ensemble. Wear this with rolled up jeans and an understated tee. Product Details Leather and stitch detailing on the midfoot leather strap for added attraction Firm footbed for extra support in all-day wear with a toe holder Branding on footbed with nubuck detail on the forefoot region with perforations Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Textured lugs all over the footbed for improved grip on all surfaces Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
